title: Keep Inventory Penalty
description: Adds a configurable xp penalty when you die while using keepInventory.
body:
# Keep Inventory Penalty

Keep Inventory Penalty adds a configurable xp penalty when you die while using keepInventory. With the default configuration your XP will be halved each time you die.

### Features:
- XP penalty on death
- Config file inside your world folder
- Reload the config using the /reload command

### Config Options for 1.21+
- Penalty enabled (default: true)
- Penalty loss percentage (default: 0.5f)
- Random penalty between two values (default: false)
- Global chat message shaming the dying player about his xp loss (default: false)
- If the player gets killed by another player, give the attacking player the penalized xp (default: false)
- Lose items enchanted with curse of vanishing (default: true)


## FAQ

### Can I include this in my Modpack?
Yes.

### Backports? 
No.

### Is this mod compatible with X?
I don't know. I will add a list of incompatible mods if problems come to my attention.
